title: StudyRunRecorded payload
description: Emitted once per completed (or failed) corpos-lab behavioral-assay study run, when the run record is POSTed to the toolkit's measure surface (action study_run_record). A study run is machine-emitted, not agent-forged: it is a parent provenance record (assay + study/materials digests + model identity + responses-dir POINTER) plus N child score-grid rows (one per condition×run cell), so it uses dedicated projection tables (proj_study_runs + proj_study_run_scores) rather than the single-flat-row forge/construct storage. This mirrors the benchmark feature (BenchmarkRunCompleted). Cross-cutting entity (entity_kind='study_run', entity_slug=run_id, project_id null in the envelope) — so project_id rides in the payload here for the fold to write the namespaced rows. Raw model responses are NEVER carried here: responses_dir is a filesystem path and materials_hashes are small SHA-256 hex digests, not blobs.

run_id.description: Stable id for this run — the entity slug and the parent-row primary key. Generated (UUIDv4) by the handler when the caller doesn't supply one.

project_id.description: Project this run belongs to. Cross-cutting events carry null project_id in the envelope, so it is mirrored here for the fold to populate proj_study_runs.project_id / proj_study_run_scores.project_id.

assay.description: The behavioral assay this run exercised (e.g. 'grounded-glyph-probe'). Primary filter dimension on the dashboard.

image.description: Container image reference the run executed under (e.g. 'localhost/lab-grounded-glyph-probe:dev').

image_digest.description: Immutable image digest (sha256:...) pinning the exact image bytes.

status.description: Terminal status of the run. 'failed' runs set error; the score grid may be partial or empty.

error.description: Failure detail when status='failed'; empty/absent for completed runs.

study_digest.description: SHA-256 (hex) digest of study.json — provenance pin for the study definition.

materials_hashes.description: Map of material filename → SHA-256 hex digest (e.g. {'scenario.md':'<hex>','glyph.md':'<hex>'}). Small hashes, NOT blobs — the raw materials stay on disk.

responses_dir.description: On-disk POINTER to the raw responses directory. A filesystem path only — the raw response blobs are NEVER persisted into the ledger.

run_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp (UTC) when the run executed. Stored verbatim as TEXT; the observe surface orders by run_at DESC (lexical == chronological for Z-suffixed RFC 3339).

rows.description: The score grid — one entry per condition×run cell. Persisted into proj_study_run_scores as child rows. The controller's nested verdict object is FLATTENED to verdict_kind/verdict_reason before it reaches this payload.

item.description: Item / scenario id for this cell (e.g. 'casg-direct').

run.description: 1-based run index within the condition (repeat number).

verdict_reason.description: Flattened verdict reason; empty when there is nothing to explain.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale / trace summary for the cell.
